title: INTENSIVE COMMUNITY-BASED SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW KING INTENSIVE COMMUNITY-BASED SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive mental health treatment services in the home and in the community. 3716 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Ages 3-18 and their families. Must have approval from Coordinated Care Organization. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP (Medicaid) and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-8pm, Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 6 Services: Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW KING
